steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
Add the $x$ terms: $x + 2x = 3x$.
Add the constant terms: $5 + (-3) = 2$.
Thus the expression simplifies to $$3x + 2$$.

steps.title: Match to choices
steps.content:
The simplified form $3x + 2$ matches choice B: $3x + 2$.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
